report = run_qa\('tmp/deck/output/presentation.pptx', deck_dir='tmp/deck'\)

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json

with open\('tests/fixtures/smartart_demo/slide_outline.json'\) as f:
    outline = json.load\(f\)

for s in outline['slides']:
    n = s['slide_number']
    bp = s.get\('body_points', []\)
    
    if n == 4:  # Pipeline flowchart — 13 steps
        s['body_points'] = [
            "Validate Brief → Brand Manager → Slide Stylist → Narrative Architect",
            "SmartArt Selector → Strategy Map → SmartArt Extractor",
            "Speaker Notes Writer → Image Generation Bridge → SmartArt Renderer",
            "Chart Renderer → Deck Assembler → Deck QA"
        ]
    elif n == 6:  # Competitive matrix
        s['body_points'] = [
            "Features: Narrative Intelligence, Image Gen, Brand, SmartArt, Notes, Assembly, QA",
            "Jack-Tar: Yes, Yes, Yes, Yes, Yes, Yes, Yes",
            "Manual PowerPoint: No, No, Manual, No, Manual, No, No",
            "Canva AI: No, Yes, Partial, No, No, No, No",
            "Beautiful.ai / Gamma.app: Partial capability across some dimensions"
        ]
    elif n == 8:  # Radar chart
        s['body_points'] = [
            "Narrative Structure: 9, Visual Design: 8, Image Quality: 8",
            "Data Visualisation: 9, Brand Consistency: 9, Speaker Support: 7"
        ]
    elif n == 14:  # Venn — 3 engines
        s['body_points'] = [
            "Set A: Mermaid.js — flowcharts, decision trees, Gantt charts",
            "Set B: Vega-Lite — bar charts, line charts, radar charts",
            "Set C: Custom SVG — SWOT, matrices, Venn, timelines, funnels",
            "Shared A+C: Flowcharts can render via both Mermaid and Custom SVG",
            "Shared B+Matplotlib: Comparator runs both for bar/line charts"
        ]
    elif n == 18:  # QA bar chart — 10 categories
        s['body_points'] = [
            "Contrast: 4, Margins: 3, Text Overflow: 3, Consistency: 5",
            "Image Quality: 4, Placeholders: 2, Missing Content: 3",
            "Accessibility: 3, Keynote: 3, SmartArt: 5"
        ]
    elif n == 19:  # Gantt — 6 personas
        s['body_points'] = [
            "Deck Conductor: Brief Validation through Final Delivery",
            "SmartArt Selector: Selection phase. Prompt Engineer: Image Generation",
            "Image Reviewer: Quality Gate. Presentation Reviewer: Final Review"
        ]
    elif n == 20:  # Stat callout — 7 points
        s['body_points'] = [
            "28 slides, 1 nautical brand, 18 SmartArt graphics across 3 engines",
            "4 enrichment tiers demonstrated, 6 rendering strategies exercised",
            "35 QA checks passed — this deck was built by the system it describes"
        ]
    elif n == 22:  # Architecture — 7 points
        s['body_points'] = [
            "Built on AI-First Business Service Architecture: 4 L1 domains",
            "Content, Design, Image, Assembly & QA — each owns its decisions",
            "The narrative-architect owns story, slide-stylist owns visuals, imagegen-bridge owns routing",
            "Every service independently invocable — not just a pipeline"
        ]
    elif n == 23:  # Cost bar chart — 6 items
        s['body_points'] = [
            "Ollama Drafts: 0, Cloud Drafts: 0.50, Production Images: 1.50",
            "SmartArt Rendering: 0, QA and Review: 0",
            "Total Typical Deck: 2.00"
        ]

with open\('tests/fixtures/smartart_demo/slide_outline.json', 'w'\) as f:
    json.dump\(outline, f, indent=2\)

print\('Fixed all slides with >5 body_points'\)
PYEOF)

import json

with open\('tests/fixtures/smartart_demo/slide_outline.json'\) as f:
    outline = json.load\(f\)

changed = []
for s in outline['slides']:
    sn = s['slide_number']
    if sn in \(2, 9, 21\) and s.get\('visual_type'\) == 'hero_image':
        s['visual_type'] = 'none'
        changed.append\(sn\)

with open\('tests/fixtures/smartart_demo/slide_outline.json', 'w'\) as f:
    json.dump\(outline, f, indent=2\)

print\(f"Changed slides {changed}: visual_type hero_image → none"\)

# Validate
import jsonschema
with open\('src/schemas/slide_outline.schema.json'\) as f:
    schema = json.load\(f\)
jsonschema.validate\(outline, schema\)
print\("Schema validation: PASS"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json
with open\('./tmp/deck/smartart-manifest.json'\) as f:
    manifest = json.load\(f\)
for g in manifest['graphics']:
    if g['status'] == 'failed':
        print\(f"Slide {g['slide_number']:2d} \({g['engine_used']:10s}\): {g.get\('file_path', 'NO PATH'\)}"\)
        # Check if file exists and size
        import os
        fp = g.get\('file_path', ''\)
        if fp:
            base = os.path.basename\(fp\)
            full = os.path.join\('./tmp/deck/smartart', base\)
            if os.path.exists\(full\):
                print\(f"  File exists: {os.path.getsize\(full\)} bytes"\)
            else:
                print\(f"  File MISSING"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
import json, traceback
from src.smartart_renderer import render

with open\('./tmp/deck/style-guide.json'\) as f:
    style_guide = json.load\(f\)

spec = {
    'slide_number': 8,
    'graphic_type': 'radar_chart',
    'engine': 'custom_svg',
    'enrichment_tier': 'pure_programmatic',
    'data': {
        'series': [
            {'label': 'Narrative Structure', 'value': 9},
            {'label': 'Visual Design', 'value': 8},
            {'label': 'Image Quality', 'value': 8},
            {'label': 'Data Visualisation', 'value': 9},
            {'label': 'Brand Consistency', 'value': 9},
            {'label': 'Speaker Support', 'value': 7}
        ]
    },
    'style_tokens': {},
    'comparator_engines': []
}

try:
    entry = render\(spec, style_guide, 'draft', './tmp/deck/smartart'\)
    print\(f'Status: {entry[\\"status\\"]}'\)
    if entry['status'] == 'failed':
        print\(f'File path: {entry.get\(\\"file_path\\", \\"EMPTY\\"\)}'\)
except Exception as e:
    traceback.print_exc\(\)
" 2>&1)
